title: COLUMBIA COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH - 211info
text: COLUMBIA COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH CREEKSIDE CENTER COLUMBIA COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services, including counseling for adults and children, psychological assessments, rehabilitation case management, residential services, psychiatric services, and outreach to outlying areas. Provides addictions/dependency treatment for youth and adults for alcohol, drugs, and gambling. Services include assessment, intensive outpatient, day treatment, referral for residential treatment, and dual diagnosis services. 58646 McNulty Way Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 397-5211 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 397-5211 Main phone Weekdays (503) 782-4499 Crisis Line (503) 438-2242 Hotline (503) 397-5373 FAX Main phone (503) 397-5211 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. All intake is done through the St. Helens office. FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Community Mental Health Agencies Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Gambling Disorder Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CCMH CRISIS LINE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH CREEKSIDE CENTER
